ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the lender (out of 10) */,
  "customer_service" TEXT /* Customer service rating (e.g., Good, Very good) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the lender */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the lender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the lender was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lender offering the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of loan product (e.g., Credit Builder Loan, Buy now, pay later) */,
  "early_payment_penalty" TEXT /* Early payment penalty terms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loan product */,
  "minimum_credit_score" INTEGER /* Minimum credit score required for the loan product */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the loan product */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the loan product */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Late payment fee for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_products_lender_id FOREIGN KEY ("lender_id") REFERENCES lenders ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bureaus" (
  "bureau_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit bureau */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the credit bureau (e.g., Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the credit bureau */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bureau_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "minimum_apr" REAL /* Minimum annual percentage rate (APR) */,
  "maximum_apr" REAL /* Maximum annual percentage rate (APR) */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount */,
  "minimum_duration" INTEGER /* Minimum repayment duration */,
  "maximum_duration" INTEGER /* Maximum repayment duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_terms_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit check */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "bureau_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit bureau used */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score obtained */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of credit check (e.g., hard, soft) */,
  "check_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the credit check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the credit check (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_checks_bureau_id FOREIGN KEY ("bureau_id") REFERENCES bureaus ("bureau_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_checks_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant (e.g., employed, self-employed) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., personal, business) */,
  "requested_amount" REAL /* Amount of loan requested by the applicant */,
  "requested_duration" INTEGER /* Repayment duration requested by the applicant */,
  "application_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the loan application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "amount" REAL /* Approved loan amount */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Repayment duration */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments made by the borrower */,
  "total_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid by the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment schedule */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "installment_number" INTEGER /* Installment number of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Payment amount */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of the payment */,
  "interest_amount" REAL /* Interest amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayment_schedules_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "installment_number" INTEGER /* Installment number of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Payment amount */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of the payment */,
  "interest_amount" REAL /* Interest amount of the payment */,
  "late_fee_amount" REAL /* Late fee amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., origination, late payment) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Late payment fee for the loan product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id")
)
